title: Blur Perfected
description: Adds blur to GUIs, a fork of Blur+ that fixes blur animation calculation bugs and simplifies the logic
body:
# Blur Perfected has been merged with Blur+ :) [Checkout My Other Mods!](https://modrinth.com/user/amiralimollaei)

**The version 6 of Blur+ now has all the patches from Blur Perfected!**
This project is archived, but I will continue to patch Blur+ and fix bugs.

---

A fork of Blur+ that changes blur animation calculation and simplifies the logic, fixing almost every single bug in Blur+ issue tracker

Changes made:
 - Spam Proof: fixes bugs related to "spamming" GUIs updates (GUIs changing too quickly, e.g. holding the E key)
 - Continuous Animations: fixes bugs where frames of the fade in/out animation were skipped, or animation was suddenly reset
 - Simpler Logic: uses a simpler logic, enabling more compatibility and stability
 - Fix Persistant Blur Issues: Fixes bugs were the blur effect was not cleared even after closing all GUIs
 - new feature that let's you select different animation curves for the background gradient and/or blur animations
 - new feature that let's you toggle blur for Book edit/view/sign screen, Command Block edit screen and Sign edit screen separately, these screens were not previously blurred at all by the upstream blur+ 5.3.2
 - optimization for not drawing background gradient or blur animations when it's not noticeable

---

> Ever thought that the world behind your inventory was just too distracting?  
> Or that the default Minecraft blur effect is just too boring?  
> Then this mod is just right for you!


![Image showing the Minecraft inventory with a blur effect in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Dt7yoh6Y/images/5fdca842171eb9405ecbf07b86cf9d012071aaff.png)
